sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n61428" key="lā" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="pref" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λᾱ-</orth>, insep. Prefix with <sense id="n61428.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">intensive</tr_> force, as in <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">λακαταπύγων, λακατάρατος</foreign>; cf. also <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">λαί-μαργος</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
